item.title: Dog trained to illegally dump rubbish, Italian authorities say
item.description: "Ingenuity can never become an alibi for incivility", the City of Catania warns.

item.title: Mourinho made 'unacceptable, huge mistake' - Kompany
item.description: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany says Jose Mourinho made a "huge mistake" with his "unacceptable" post-match comments after the alleged racial abuse...

item.title: Ratcliffe avoids FA charge over immigration comments
item.description: Manchester United co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe's claims the UK has been "colonised by immigrants" will not lead to any sanction by the Football Associat...

item.title: Ratcliffe avoids FA charge over immigration comments

item.title: Neutral athletes allowed to attend closing ceremony
item.description: Individual Neutral Athletes will be allowed to attend the closing ceremony of the Milan-Cortina 2026 Winter Olympics, having not been present at the o...
